revision.comment: HouseBlaster moved page [[Template:Tl2]] to [[Template:Template link interwiki]]: expand template name per [[WP:TPN]]
revision.text: {{[[:{{ safesubst:#if: {{{sister|}}} | {{{sister}}}: }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{lang|}}} | {{{lang}}}: }}{{ safesubst:ns:Template }}:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]{{ safesubst:#if: {{{2|}}} | |{{{2}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} | |{{{3}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{4|}}} | |{{{4}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{5|}}} | |{{{5}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{6|}}} | |{{{6}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{7|}}} | |{{{7}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{8|}}} | |{{{8}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{9|}}} | |{{{9}}} }}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: HouseBlaster moved page [[Template:Tl2]] to [[Template:Template link interwiki]]: expand template name per [[WP:TPN]]
revision.text: {{[[:{{ safesubst:#if: {{{sister|}}} | {{{sister}}}: }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{lang|}}} | {{{lang}}}: }}{{ safesubst:ns:Template }}:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]{{ safesubst:#if: {{{2|}}} | |{{{2}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} | |{{{3}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{4|}}} | |{{{4}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{5|}}} | |{{{5}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{6|}}} | |{{{6}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{7|}}} | |{{{7}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{8|}}} | |{{{8}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{9|}}} | |{{{9}}} }}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting
revision.text: {{[[:{{ safesubst:#if: {{{sister|}}} | {{{sister}}}: }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{lang|}}} | {{{lang}}}: }}{{ safesubst:ns:Template }}:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]{{ safesubst:#if: {{{2|}}} | |{{{2}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} | |{{{3}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{4|}}} | |{{{4}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{5|}}} | |{{{5}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{6|}}} | |{{{6}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{7|}}} | |{{{7}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{8|}}} | |{{{8}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{9|}}} | |{{{9}}} }}}} {{documentation}}

{{Tfm/dated|page=Template link interwiki|otherpage=Tiw|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2026 January 24#Template:Template link interwiki|type=inline|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{[[:{{ safesubst:#if: {{{sister|}}} | {{{sister}}}: }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{lang|}}} | {{{lang}}}: }}{{ safesubst:ns:Template }}:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]{{ safesubst:#if: {{{2|}}} | |{{{2}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} | |{{{3}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{4|}}} | |{{{4}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{5|}}} | |{{{5}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{6|}}} | |{{{6}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{7|}}} | |{{{7}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{8|}}} | |{{{8}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{9|}}} | |{{{9}}} }}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
revision.text: {{Tfm/dated|page=Template link interwiki|otherpage=Tiw|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2026 January 24#Template:Template link interwiki|type=inline|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{[[:{{ safesubst:#if: {{{sister|}}} | {{{sister}}}: }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{lang|}}} | {{{lang}}}: }}{{ safesubst:ns:Template }}:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]{{ safesubst:#if: {{{2|}}} | |{{{2}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} | |{{{3}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{4|}}} | |{{{4}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{5|}}} | |{{{5}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{6|}}} | |{{{6}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{7|}}} | |{{{7}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{8|}}} | |{{{8}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{9|}}} | |{{{9}}} }}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Tfm/dated|page=Template link interwiki|otherpage=Tiw|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2026 January 24#Template:Template link interwiki|type=inline|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{[[:{{ safesubst:#if: {{{sister|}}} | {{{sister}}}: }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{lang|}}} | {{{lang}}}: }}{{ safesubst:ns:Template }}:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]{{ safesubst:#if: {{{2|}}} | |{{{2}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} | |{{{3}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{4|}}} | |{{{4}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{5|}}} | |{{{5}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{6|}}} | |{{{6}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{7|}}} | |{{{7}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{8|}}} | |{{{8}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{9|}}} | |{{{9}}} }}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text: {{[[:{{ safesubst:#if: {{{sister|}}} | {{{sister}}}: }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{lang|}}} | {{{lang}}}: }}{{ safesubst:ns:Template }}:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]{{ safesubst:#if: {{{2|}}} | |{{{2}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{3|}}} | |{{{3}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{4|}}} | |{{{4}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{5|}}} | |{{{5}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{6|}}} | |{{{6}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{7|}}} | |{{{7}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{8|}}} | |{{{8}}} }}{{ safesubst:#if: {{{9|}}} | |{{{9}}} }}}} {{documentation}}
